nature_language:
We are 4 people traveling from Shenzhen to Shanghai for 3 days, and need to meet at least one of the following requirements:  
1. Want to try these restaurants: Jundongji Authentic Shanghai Noodle House (Tianyaoqiao Road Branch) and Tuguri Japanese Yakiniku and THE WANG Wangpin (Shanghai Center Store).  
2. Want to stay at the following hotel: MaxX by Steigenberger Shanghai, Hongqiao.
